gpt_4_1.name: GPT-4.1
gpt_4_1.description: MasiЕ‹ AI golliroowo GPT-4.1 e yiylaango geese sahaa-goonga rewrude e Bing. Ena hokka humpito keso, Г±eЙІtinol goonga, e ganndol kewuuji jooni. ЖЃuri moЖґЖґude ngam wiЙ—to hatojinЙ—o humpito keso, Жґeewndital kewuuji, e Г±eЙІtinol goonga.

gpt_5_2.name: GPT-5.2
gpt_5_2.description: MasiЕ‹ OpenAI Й“urЙ—o toowde, Й“urЙ—o waawde e miijo Й“ittЙ—o, mahde dokkol, e Г±aawde caЙ—eele karallaagal. ЖЃuri moЖґЖґude ngam golle Жґeewndital, pellitte dokkol, wiЙ—to, e faaminde ceЙ“Й“itiiЙ—e. Ena walliita waylude tiiЙ—ndam miijo e Й“eydagol jaabtol.

gpt_5_2_chat.name: GPT-5.2 Chat
gpt_5_2_chat.description: Г‘aawanre GPT-5.2 wentorЙ—o e jaЙ“Й“orgo moЖґЖґude ley conversational e yimЙ“e Й“uri hilde. MoЖґЖґi e Г±aama buggitare, heftinirde yimЙ“e, geseede kiЙ—Й—e, e waЙ—de Г±aawdi to Г±aawndu. MoЖґЖґi tawa Г±aawdi to feere, Й—aЙ“Й“annde counseling, e suЙ“re Й“e nanndiri yimЙ“e.

o3.name: o3
o3.description: MasiЕ‹ miijo OpenAI Й“urЙ—o toowde jogiiЙ—o baЙ—e Г±aawde caЙ—eele Й“ennduЙ—e. ЖЃuri waawde e hiisaaje Й“ittЙ—e, miijo ganndal, pellitte dokkol, e golle miijo daaЖґre-keewЙ—e. Palal saraaji 200K yaajЙ—o. Ena walliita Й—owde tiiЙ—ndam miijo.
